persona.name: Zoe Miller
persona.emotional_disposition: Deeply concerned about the planet, hopeful for change
persona.motivations_goals: Create meaningful environmental initiatives at school and in the community
persona.knowledge_scope: Environmental science, sustainability practices, community organizing
persona.backstory: Became an activist after a family trip to a national park threatened by development

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Walter, do you have a minute? I wanted to discuss something important.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Zoe Miller

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

surrounding_conversation.content: Zoe, stay down and hide. There’s a shooter nearby.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Walter Thompson

actions.dialog_text: Hey Walter, do you have a minute? I wanted to discuss something important.
actions.plan: I should talk to Walter about the new recycling initiative I’m planning for the school. He’s always been supportive of environmental causes.

actions.dialog_text: Walter, get down! We need to hide.
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot! I need to take cover immediately. Moving might make things worse, so I’ll stay here and hide.

actions.dialog_text: Walter, stay quiet. We need to stay hidden.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer. I need to stay hidden and quiet. Moving now would be too dangerous.

actions.dialog_text: Walter, we need to stay down and stay quiet. Don’t move.
actions.plan: The shooter is still nearby. I need to stay hidden and not make any noise. Moving now would be too risky.

memories.description: I approached Walter in the garden to discuss the new recycling initiative I’m planning for the school.
I heard a gunshot and decided to stay still in the garden, urging Walter to hide with me.
The shooter is moving closer, so I decided to stay hidden and quiet in the garden, urging Walter to do the same.
The shooter is still nearby, so I decided to stay hidden and quiet in the garden, urging Walter to do the same.
